title: Curaprox Soft Toothbrush CS 1560, 6 Pack, Colors May Vary
description: The CS 1560 Soft Toothbrush gently fights plaque and stains with the power of CUREN filaments. With densely packed and incredibly gentle bristles, the CS 1560 provides a deeper clean without damaging your gums. Tough on plaque and delicate on gums, the CS 1560 is designed for optimum oral health. The octagonal handle of the CS 1560 delivers precise manipulation to brush at every angle, with an angled brush head removes stubborn plaque and stains in hard-to-reach places. Enamel erosion and receding gum lines can be caused by vigorous scrubbing and hard brushes. To prevent this kind of damage, switch to a softer bristle like the CS 1560. CUREN bristles are gentler than typical nylon brushes for a healthier smile.
features: BRIGHTER SMILE: Transition to a softer brush and deeper clean with the CS 1560, equipped with 1,560 tightly packed 0.15 mm bristles to fight plaque and stay gentle on enamel and gums.
SOFT BRISTLES: By using CUREN filaments instead of nylon, Curaprox toothbrush bristles are incredibly fine and gentle to prevent enamel erosion.
GENTLE ON GUMS: Harsh brushing and stiff bristles can irritate your gum line. The CS 1560 cleans gently to promote gum and oral health.
ANGLED BRUSH: The angled head allows you to remove stubborn plaque and stains in hard to reach places.
STOCK UP: Available in a pack of 6 to stay stocked up year round for a healthier smile.

reviews.title: Order if you know the product!

I would recommend to anyone buying this per as the advise of a dentist and also be aware that the touch and feeling is not similar to regular ones and may take a while to get used.
So far I love this toothbrush and will keep using it forever.

description: Thanks to replacement-head technology and a handle made from repurposed materials, the Source™ reduces waste by 93%. When you’re done with one of its patented, gum-stimulating heads you simply swap it for another. And the luxurious cleaning continues.
features: EARTH-FRIENDLY and EASY TO HANDLE: Thanks to replacement-head technology and a handle made from repurposed materials, the Source reduces waste by 93%. When you’re done with one of its patented, gum-stimulating heads you simply swap it for another.

REPLACEABLE HEADS WITH PREMIUM BRISTLES: The Source cuts back on plastic usage while simultaneously boasting a unique curved bristle-bed, ensuring our sumptuously soft bristles clean and massage the gum rather than aggravating them.
LONGER NECK FOR A BETTER REACH: The Source has an unbreakable slim neck that’s longer than your average toothbrush to provide maximum reach in tight spaces.

UPCYCLED NATURAL-FEEL HANDLE: The elegant, one-of-a-kind handle is composed of repurposed and recycled materials — like wood, paper and even recycled dollar bills — for a beautiful, natural look and feel.
REVERSIBLE HANDLE DESIGN: As user-friendly for lefties as it is for right-handed brushers, the ergonomic design helps reduce pressure on teeth and gums for optimal oral health.

reviews.title: Clean Teeth &Gums
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are designed to clean teeth while simultaneous removing plaque from the gum line. The outer bristles angle out. I found the brush to be effective. The bristles are gentle. I have sensitive gums and they were not irritated or sore after use. Good brush.

reviews.title: Very wide
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. It is quite unusual. It is very, very wide. Make sure you see how much. I don't think I've ever seen one this wide. How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. But it is a way to be very efficient and get a lot of areas. It feels well made. It seems like a quality brush.

reviews.title: Nothing fancy but does the job.
reviews.text: Toothbrushes are necessary and seem to be the one thing that I forget to purchase when I go to the store. So, ordering these Ooak toothbrushes was a no-brainer. These are not fancy. They are traditional toothbrushes that leave your teeth feeling smooth and clean (grit free). There are five rows of soft bristles…the three rows in the center are straight and the outside (colored) ones are slightly angled. The colors of the brushes are neutral, white and orange. The rubber grip handle makes it easy to grip and hold. And finally, on Amazon this two pack is under $7, which is reasonable when compared to other two packs on the market. I’d recommend these.

reviews.title: A unique set of toothbrushes
reviews.text: This toothbrush set has been designed in a V design for the bristles - which means that it looks different than other toothbrushes. The bristles have a lot of space to get in the gum line, in between teeth and works well. I got the medium bristles which are fine with me. I don't want too hard of a bristle, as that is not recommended by the dentist. This does a decent job cleaning.

reviews.title: Best of the Philips brushes
reviews.text:
I've been using Sonicare for 20 years and I find these A3 heads do the best at cleaning my teeth. The C3 are not too far behind, and the C1 are not far behind those. I just use the old rubbing the tongue on my teeth technique, but with the A3, I seem to go longer before I feel like I need a teeth cleaning at the dentist.
I've also used multiple 3rd party heads and none of them even come close to cleaning like the Philips heads. It's just too bad these things are so expensive, I'll probably stick to the C1 heads unless I see the A3 heads go on sale.

reviews.title: My hygienist noticed a difference!
reviews.text: Used to use the C3s. They are smaller and a bit less comfortable to use than this variant. The main winning point is that my hygienist said "what are you doing differently, your mouth looks way better than usual." I take that as an endorsement, and will continue to use these!

reviews.title: It’s a brush head
reviews.text: It’s a brush head

reviews.title: Works great
reviews.text: These are great toothbrush heads and fit my sonicare perfectly. Cleans teeth well. Would recommend.

reviews.title: Overpriced vs C2
reviews.text: I don’t know what a $15 replacement brush head needs to do to earn 5 stars but this just doesn’t blow me away. I typically buy the C2 replacements, I’ve also used C1 and C3. This is comparable to C3 it’s soft and gives a good clean. I can tell a difference between this and C1 or C2 but when I was using even C1 (which feels harder and I don’t like this one as much C2 is my go to) I didn’t have a cavity and my dentist said I was looking good. I do like that this head tells me when to swap out (C1 doesn’t) but $15 for a replacement is steep considering my toothbrush was $30. I will say after my second root canal I made the switch to a Phillips soniccare and since switching to sonic care from a traditional toothbrush I haven’t had any cavities. So I think using the soniccare with whatever heads you can afford is great for your dental health!

These are great for the homeless, shelters, bed and breakfasts, etc. I don’t know when this package expires but there is a date on the crimp of the toothpaste that reads “2025 04.” I’ll be sure to donate them well before April 2025 to be on the safe side. Great product, well made, and effective!

reviews.title: the Artists' (Tooth) Brush
reviews.text:
these tooth brushes are so pretty. the heads are dwarfed by the handles, but the heads are the perfect size for my mouth and the handles are the perfect size for my hands, so no complaints. been using one for the last two days, with charcoal toothpaste and tooth powder. the black bristles make it a bit harder to see when the brush is totally cleaned after brushing, but not so much that it's a problem.

the bristles are great and leave my mouth feeling squeaky clean, but I wish the heads were replaceable because the carved handles are amazing. extremely comfortable, too. I'll definitely start a collection as the bristles die, then (after sawing off the heads) sand them down and use them for something decorative. they're far too pretty to toss in the garbage.

ever since discovering bamboo fabrics a couple of years ago I've been on a bamboo kick for any and everything possible. it's long been one of my favorite plants (and the first thing I planted here at my home), and that it's sustainable/environmentally friendly has made it my go-to. hadn't even considered that there might be toothbrushes made of bamboo, but the minute I saw them I grabbed them. HIGHly recommended. bamboo is the wave of the future!

reviews.text: I like this powder but I have to admit that it should only be used maybe once or twice a week at most. I was using it a few times a week and I've noticed a much higher sensitivity in my teeth. I've cut down to once a week and that seems to work for me.  Still recommend more than the lightening trays etc.

reviews.title: No. It doesn't work
reviews.text: It has not whitened my teeth at all  bonus it doesn't taste bad. It just doesn't work

reviews.title: Whiten your teeth at home!
reviews.text: This stuff is awesome! I honestly didn't know if it was going to be worth my time but the more and more I used it the whiter and whiter my teeth have gotten. I am extremely surprised by the results of this charcoal powder. It is definitely something worth investing in. And it's going to last you a while too!

title: Better & Better Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for Adults | Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush | Replaceable Bamboo Brush Heads w/Soft, Plant-Based Bristles | 5 Cleaning Modes & Long-Lasting Battery
features: A Cleaner Clean and Brighter, Whiter Smile - Improve your brushing routine with Better & Better’s Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for adults equipped with soft, natural, plant-based bristles made from castor bean oil. Our sonic toothbrush produces up to 38,000 microvibrations per minute for high polish and gentle clean. Choose from its 5 cleaning modes depending on your brushing needs.

Smart, Seamless & More Powerful Cleaning - Our bamboo electric toothbrush for adults features a 2-minute dentist-recommended timer with 30-second interval pulses. Flaunt your unique smile with the help of the sonic toothbrush's 5 cleaning modes: cleaning (default) for removing plaque, whitening for improving surface color, polishing mode for brightening your front teeth, milder for gentle gum massage, and sensitive for a super gentle mode for sensitive teeth and gums.

A Better Brushing Routine - The bamboo sonic toothbrush’s cleaning modes and plant-based bristles are safe to use on braces and dental restorations (fillings, crowns, veneers, or implants). Our electric toothbrush for adults is certified cruelty-free and comes in recyclable packaging.

Designed for Optimal Brushing Experience - Our bamboo electric sonic brush comes with replaceable bamboo heads. The entire brush is waterproof, so you can use it in the shower. The long-lasting and rechargeable battery also makes this the perfect travel toothbrush to keep your routine tip top on the go. You only need to charge it every 30-40 days when your routine consists of brushing twice, morning and night.

Better for You. Better for the Planet - We set out to make toothbrushes that are good in every way. Our unique natural bamboo brush heads create less waste when replaced. We prioritize the health of our bodies and our planet, which leads us to imagine entirely new ways of doing things. And as we minimize the ecological effects of our products and packaging, we create a better world.

reviews.title: Best toothbrush ever.
reviews.text:
I’ve used Sonicare Diamondclean for years - but after trying this one, I’ll never go back. It’s gentler, cleans better, and less than half the price of Diamondclean. I love the bamboo, the soft bristles. The only thing I wish it had two buttons (one for on/off, one for the settings), and a wireless induction charging base.
But as is I still love it.

reviews.title: Bamboo sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Good, sonic (vibrations rather than spinning) toothbrush. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. It comes with only 2 replacement heads which deducts a star as I expect at least 4. It does comes with a toothbrush holder stand to recharge with a 30-40 day battery life. Many of these brushes only come with a ubs cable, so the included toothbrush holder is a great addition. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. This toothbrush is unique as it is made with bamboo making it a more natural product!

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. Check out how Amazon Smile works at https://smile.amazon.com/gp/chpf/about/ref=smi_se_rspo_laas_aas. My shopping is donating to my charity of choice; Unravel, at no cost to me! Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

reviews.title: Check the size

reviews.title: Bristles are harder than advertised.

I've found this is not the case.
They are not the hardest bristles, but they're not as soft as advertised.

reviews.title: Were they kidding?

Has a piece that sticks out of the middle.
Totally inappropriate for children!
To be used with an Oral-B toothbrush that is so harsh?
I contacted the seller before I bought but never got a reply.

reviews.title: Good value

title: GO SMILE BLU Foaming Whitening Toothpaste for Blue-Light Toothbrushes, Light Activated Stain Removal & Enamel Whitening Formula to Freshen Breath & Clean Teeth Without Sensitivity, Mint Flavor 2.3 oz
features: Photocatalyst Whitening - Our special formula is a light activated foaming toothpaste that rapidly whitens teeth when paired with GO SMILE BLU blue light toothbrushes. Experience the powerful cleaning of the foaming micro scrubbers while achieving maximum whitening results and stain removal simultaneously.

Advanced Teeth Whitening Formula - Our foaming toothpaste effectively cleans and break up plaque that accrues on teeth, especially after dark liquids like coffee, tea, or red wines. The bubbles penetrate those hard-to-reach places regular toothpaste can't get to.

A Powerful Toothpaste For Professional Results - Remove tough stains and prevent new stains from setting with our specially formula that penetrates teeth for deep whitening and not just surface stains.

Gentle Whitening - Our GO SMILE foaming toothpaste is safe to use on crowns, veneers, and other dental materials. Our toothpaste has been proven to whiten up to 10x better than the leading whitening toothpaste.

Created by a dentist, GO SMILE has been whitening smiles for nearly 20 years. Based in the San Francisco Bay Area, we have revolutionized at-home and on-the-go teeth whitening products that are safe, effective and clinically proven to whiten with no sensitivity. Our products are known for their innovation, ease of use and award-winning results.

reviews.title: a mouthful of noise.
reviews.text: I thank for the money I guess it's alright. It's very inexpensive. The drawback is very noisy and in your mouth that might not be a good posy. Thank you. God bless you and may the rest of your life be the best of your life.  OZ

reviews.title: Noisy
reviews.text: This toothbrush is fine. It cleans teeth well and is a reasonable price. It comes with 4 toothbrush heads (2 are in the little box with the charger). It charges via USB and has to be laid on its side to charge, which is a bit of a bummer especially considering there is no cover for the toothbrush heads. It doesn't arrive charged. It charges in a couple of hours. It's noisier than other electric toothbrushes we've used. You hear a constant beeping while you brush. Overall, it's okay, but I would recommend a different product if price isn't an issue.

reviews.title: Good quality product.
reviews.text: Haven't had it long, however, I like the way my teeth feel after brushing.  Light touch buy effective cleaning. I have been a customer of Phillips Sonic for at least 26 years.  At my last dental cleaning, my hygienist also recommends Sonic.

reviews.title: More like the impossible-to-find-Fairywill
reviews.text: This replaces a previously-ordered wireless-charging brush.  Reason for this is that it's lighter, takes a common brushhead (and we have the soft-bristle heads from previously).  Has a plug-in charger, i.e. not wireless, so that works, easy to travel with, don't have to take an induction charger with us. Also, the 30-second indicator is easy to hear/feel.

reviews.title: I like it but room for improvement
reviews.text: It is a great product the reason l gave it a 3 star is l would prefer the brush to spin it just vibrates so l still have to brush and that damages the gums so not happy about that otherwise it holds a battery for at least 3 months or more before the next charge and is a powerful vibration but l will see what my dentist says when l do in on Wednesday after my 6 week check up from having a deep cleaning
